top3.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN cs_item_sk = i_item_sk THEN cs_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS catalog_sales_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ws_item_sk = i_item_sk THEN ws_ext_sales_price ELSE 0 END) AS web_sales_revenue
FROM item
LEFT JOIN catalog_sales ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
LEFT JOIN web_sales ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
LEFT JOIN date_dim ON (cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk OR ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk)
WHERE d_moy = 11 AND d_year = 1998
GROUP BY i_item_id
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN cs_item_sk =...
